item.title: Markets Rise, But Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly positive market environment, Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, touching an all-time low near Rs 222.35 on 25 Mar 2026. The stock’s underperformance stands in stark contrast to sector gains and broader indices, signalling persistent headwinds for this micro-cap banking entity. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, rising by 11.89% to 1,97,455 contracts. This increase accompanies a 1.66% gain in the stock price, reflecting evolving market positioning and investor sentiment amid mixed technical and volume signals. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and a positive price trajectory, prompting a reassessment of its market stance. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Max Healthcare Institute Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd (MAXHEALTH) has witnessed a significant 15.54% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock remains close to its 52-week low, reflecting a complex interplay of cautious optimism and sectoral headwinds. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd has witnessed a significant 25.4% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock trading near its 52-week low and underperforming its sector, the sudden spike in open interest alongside rising volumes suggests a complex interplay of directional bets and hedging strategies among market participants. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Asset Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd (HDFCAMC) has witnessed a significant 11.48% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting positioning among traders. Despite a modest 1.80% gain in the stock price on 25 Mar 2026, the surge in OI to 37,755 contracts from 33,866 the previous day suggests growing speculative interest and potential directional bets in the capital markets sector. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Life Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd has witnessed a notable 11.57% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent uptick in the stock price, the company’s overall technical and fundamental indicators suggest a cautious outlook, with a strong sell rating reaffirmed by MarketsMOJO. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: SBI Life Insurance Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd has witnessed a significant 23.9% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: ICICI Lombard Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals

Despite a modest 2.6% gain in the stock price, the underlying technical and volume patterns suggest a complex interplay of bullish and bearish bets as the stock trades near its 52-week low. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Aditya Birla Capital Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Momentum
item.description: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd (ABCAPITAL) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 3.98% gain on 25 Mar 2026, supported by rising volumes and a strong delivery volume spike, reflecting growing investor confidence amid a mixed moving average backdrop. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: AU Small Finance Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Rising Market Momentum
item.description: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd (AUBANK) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market interest and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 3.62% gain on 25 Mar 2026, supported by a 17.02% increase in open interest, reflecting evolving investor positioning and increased trading volumes. item.title: JSW Energy Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: JSW Energy Ltd (JSWENERGY) has witnessed a notable 10.56% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent upgrade to a Sell rating from Hold by MarketsMOJO, the stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices in the last two trading sessions, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders.
